title: Lucky Clover!
description: This mod adds cute (rare) consumable four leaf clovers to minecraft!
body:
## _NOTE: This Mod Requires [CuriosAPI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)_


This mod adds Four Leaf Clovers to Minecraft! ![four_leaf_clover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cceaa7e3196c536dbcd7280ebbd2781357500b5.png) When consumed it provides the player with 20 seconds of Luck.The plant can be found growing in Forests, Sparse Jungles, & Swamps. ![clover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c51ef5c45861bb844a96709cfe435c843c83bd6_0.webp)
They have a Light Level of 5 & spawn particles in a small radius to make it easier for players to find them during the Night.



Additionally, they have a golden variety that is used to brew Luck Potions ![golden clover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e0833eda903d4628450d803acc0ba0e08420f6c.png) (thick potion + golden clover). These can be found in chests where golden apples are also likely to spawn. 



Golden Clovers provide the player with 45 seconds of Luck & reduced Golden Apple effects.



Golden Pendants can be found ![golden_pendant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77578458794fec93c9a725134ff8b1ae2aa794d9.png) in Nether Bastion Treasure Chests, this gives the player +3 luck ![luck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8404a39a6280ed5cde65cdf3ae4745bf9c8ea8b6.png) attribute.



A Lucky Horseshoe ![horseshoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99ed4982c15d828887e615e444108462ad0b0175.png) can be found in chests in dungeons, abandoned mineshafts and chests belonging to illagers. This gives the player +1 luck ![luck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8404a39a6280ed5cde65cdf3ae4745bf9c8ea8b6.png) attribute.

## _Update 1.1.0 - 15 January 2026 Random Update_ 

- Updated Textures
- Achievements
- New Items & Food
- Gold Ring Curio
- Compatability with Farmers Delight and Farmers Respite (these are not required to use this mod)
- Ham, Smoked Ham, and Egg Textures are from Farmers Delight to have a Consistent Art Style 


Adds Decorative Wood Blocks - Wood Siding
